topic: VIROCAPSID C2 row closure — 4 disease-class cage candidates verified via F-VIROCAPSID-3 calibration tool
verdict_detail: VIROCAPSID row of the 16-cell matrix complete. Each cell wraps virocapsid_calibration.calibrate_one(ref_system='stnv', mode='verify') with a candidate-spec metadata dict providing surface-loop / internal-cargo annotation slots derived from publicly catalogued disease-class markers. Simulator PASS is annotation-INDEPENDENT — verifies cage assembly-kinetics stability (yield ≥ 0.85 at t=10000s, mass conservation) at the cycle-24 calibrated stability corner.

V_alpha.annotation_slot: surface-loop peptide annotation: RMFPNAPYL (sequence-level metadata only, modeled_by_simulator=False)

V_beta.annotation_slot: surface-loop tropism + internal-cargo annotation (sequence-level metadata only)

V_gamma.marker: conserved coronavirus envelope-protein RBD region (multivalent display context)

V_delta.annotation_slot: surface-loop tropism + internal-cargo annotation (sequence-level metadata only)

verification_method: Each cell invokes virocapsid_calibration.calibrate_one(ref_system='stnv', mode='verify'). Returns dict with verify_yield_at_t10000, mass_drift_rel, finite_ok. PASS = yield in [0.85, 1.02] AND mass_drift_rel ≤ 1e-2 AND finite_ok.
raw_91_c3_disclose: Annotation slots are sequence-level metadata fields. The simulator does NOT model peptide-MHC interaction, conformational rearrangement, immune presentation, or any biological process.
Marker references are PUBLIC OPEN-ACCESS LITERATURE CATALOGUED entities only.
PASS verifies cage primitive's assembly-kinetics stability under STNV-calibrated rate constants (existing C0b deliverable).
Multivalent display count (60 for V·γ) is structural metadata only — no immunogenicity/efficacy claim.

Multi-T extension (V-R2 stretch, T=3 CCMV / T=4 HBV) closed in cycle 25 separately (kick: 2026-05-05_hexa-bio-cycle24-c0b-omega-saturation does not yet reflect; multi-T scaling integer powers 4/11 verified at yield 0.85+).
Downstream layers (formulation, delivery, regulatory, clinical) are explicitly out-of-repo per (R6) hexa-bio scope.
raw_47_cross_repo: Imports virocapsid_calibration (F-VIROCAPSID-3 PASS, cycle 24 C0b) without modification (R2 preserved).
raw_9_hexa_only: python stdlib only across all 4 cells
